basic_details.job_title: IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore)
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Indore (IIT Indore) Junior Research Fellow (JRF) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website iiti.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 28 years Age relaxation will be as per government rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Masters degree in Physics, Biophysics, Bioinformatics, Biomedical Science with GATE/UGC/CSIR-JRF/DST-INSPIRE OR M. Tech degree in Computer Science and Engineering/ Electrical/ Electronics & Communication/ Instrumentation/ Biomedical/Medical Electronics with GATE or UGC/CSIR-JRF/NET-LS/DST-INSPIRE OR Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and Engineering/ Electrical/ Electronics & Communication/ Instrumentation/ Biomedical/Medical Electronics with GATE/UGC/CSIR-JRF/ NET-LS/DST-INSPIRE qualification or equivalent fellowship
qualification.details: Minimum first class in Masters degree in Physics, Biophysics, Bioinformatics, Biomedical Science, with a valid GATE/UGC/CSIR-JRF/DST-INSPIRE qualification or equivalent fellowship. Minimum first class M. Tech degree in Computer Science and Engineering/ Electrical/ Electronics & Communication/ Instrumentation / Biomedical/Medical Electronics with a GATE or valid UGC/CSIR-JRF/NET-LS/DST-INSPIRE qualification or equivalent fellowship. Minimum first class Bachelor's degree in Computer Science and Engineering/ Electrical/ Electronics & Communication/ Instrumentation / Biomedical/Medical Electronics with a valid GATE/UGC/CSIR-JRF/ NET-LS /DST-INSPIRE qualification or equivalent fellowship.

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 25-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Indore to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Indore is 25th May 2026. Ensure all your details are submitted accurately before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates need a Master's degree in Physics, Biophysics, Bioinformatics, Biomedical Science with a valid GATE/UGC/CSIR-JRF/DST-INSPIRE qualification, or an M. Tech degree in relevant engineering fields with a GATE or equivalent fellowship, or a Bachelor's degree in relevant engineering fields with a GATE or equivalent fellowship.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Junior Research Fellow position is 28 years. Age relaxation will be provided as per the prevailing government norms and regulations.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Junior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Junior Research Fellow position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 37,000, along with House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Junior Research Fellow position at the Indian Institute of Technology Indore.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application fee for the IIT Indore Junior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: There is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the available information.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting candidates based on their academic merit, followed by an interview to assess their suitability for the role.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual position. The job type is specified as contractual, meaning it is for a fixed tenure.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Indore located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Indore is located in Indore, Madhya Pradesh.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for this position?
faq.answer: You can apply online through the official website of IIT Indore or via the direct application link provided in the 'Important Links' section before the last date of application.
